packageRules.description: Everything that is not a benchmark candidate (harness, types, tooling)
Benchmark candidate libraries and their companions — grouped so the PR benchmark comment shows the performance impact of each batch
Runtime version bumps get their own PR so the A/B benchmark comment attributes performance shifts to the runtime change
Each bench matrix entry deliberately tracks one Node major line — adding a new major is a manual matrix edit, so never propose crossing one

customManagers.description: Node versions in the bench matrix — hidden from the github-actions manager behind ${{ matrix.version }}
